red.scratchpad: Use 5 mbt behind x=22 cover, retreat when HP<30%; keep infantry near cover, avoid standing next to mbt; prioritize killing medic then mbt then low HP; mortar stay on x=22, fire over wall using LOS, retreat if low; medic heal allies <50% and stay with infantry; drone orbit edge of 18‑tile vision, broadcast enemy pos each tick, attack only within 2 tiles, retreat when low.

blue.scratchpad: Observation: mbt lost all units due to melee with enemy infantry; repositioning behind cover at x=41 reduces exposure. Mortar performed well staying behind cover; using world.path to reach cover improves safety. Infantry needs better target prioritization: kill medics first, then low‑HP units, and finish low‑HP infantry quickly. Medic count increased to 5 to improve healing of frontline units. Drones provide vision but die quickly in melee; keep them at distance and broadcast positions each tick. Retreat_until committed for all units prevents None target errors and reduces crashes. Future: test pathfinding for mortar and medic to cover, verify move_toward respects obstacles, consider adding a sixth drone if points allow.
